title: Gin’s Loyalty Breaks Under Krieg’s Cruelty
scene: On pages 6–9, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Luffy finally shatters Krieg’s pride and ends the battle at the Baratie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is that what you were wondering?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: How can he keep on charging straight ahead without the slightest hesitation!?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: I'm the great pirate fleet Admiral Don Krieg!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Give me some support, you bas- tards!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This time, it'll really be the end!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Or I'll kill the lot of you.

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
